description_long: This is a classic compact car with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a two-tone scheme of turquoise blue and light gray. The vehicle features a distinctive curved roof, circular headlights, and chrome bumpers both at the front and rear. The windows are slightly tinted, and the car has a pair of side mirrors mounted on the front doors. The wheels are covered with chrome hubcaps, and the rear engine compartment is subtly indicated by the vented cover at the back. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century European automobiles, particularly the Volkswagen Beetle, with its iconic fenders and compact proportions.
description: A classic, rounded compact car in turquoise blue and light gray with chrome bumpers and circular headlights, reminiscent of a vintage Volkswagen Beetle.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the curved back, vented engine cover, chrome bumper, and taillights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-tone paint, rounded roof, side windows, and chrome hubcaps.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the iconic rounded hood, circular headlights, chrome bumper, and windshield.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the two-tone body, side windows, and chrome details.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual round headlights, single arrangement, classic chrome bezel
